prompt: Using the provided reference image, recreate the same business meeting as a polished, high-end corporate publicity photo from a new angle. Move the viewpoint closer to the presentation screen and shift to a wide front-left perspective so the display dominates the left side and the meeting table with the attendees sits on the right near large floor-to-ceiling windows. Replace the dim surveillance-camera look with bright natural daylight, clean modern office lighting, and a professional architectural interior feel. Remove all CCTV overlays, timestamps, recording indicators, floor/device text, and other security-camera artifacts. Upgrade the display content into a sleek keynote-style strategy slide in Chinese with the headline "2026年度战略规划：云端协同与新生态构建". On the left side of the slide, show 1 upward-trending quarterly bar chart labeled with 4 bars: Q1 +15%, Q2 +22%, Q3 +18%, Q4 +25%. On the right side, show 3 text sections with bold headings: "技术驱动创新", "全球化市场拓展", and "用户体验升级", each with short Chinese body copy beneath. Keep the scene photorealistic, with a premium corporate brand aesthetic, neat seating arrangement, and subtle face anonymization/soft blur on the people.
